name: Always On Top
description: Adds a toggle button on the main menu to keep the Geometry Dash window always on top of other windows.

enabled-at-startup.name: Enable at startup
enabled-at-startup.description: Automatically enable Always On Top every time Geometry Dash is launched.

show-notifications.name: Show notifications
show-notifications.description: Display a small notification whenever Always On Top is toggled.

remember-state.name: Remember last state
remember-state.description: Restore the last Always On Top state when the game restarts. Overridden by 'Enable at startup' when that option is on.
